SEARCH
Module UniversitySystem
Package core

Class DataStorage

java.lang.Object
core.DataStorage
public class DataStorage extends Object
Singleton class responsible for storing and managing all university system data. Handles: - users - courses - news - requests - researchers - student organizations Also provides serialization functionality for saving and loading data from files.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Sabina

      public static List<model.users.StudentOrganization> getOrganizations()
      Returns all organizations.

      public static List<model.users.User> getUsers()
      Returns all users.

      Returns all researchers.

      unmodifiable list of researchers

    • getNews

      public static List<model.research.News> getNews()
      Returns sorted news list. Pinned news appear first.
      Returns:
      sorted list of news

    • save

      public static boolean save()
      Saves all system data into files.
      Returns:
      true if all data saved successfully

    • load

      public static void load()
      Loads all saved system data from files.

      Returns formatted storage information.

    • printAllResearcherPapers

      public static void printAllResearcherPapers(Comparator<model.research.ResearchPaper> comparator)
      Prints all research papers from all researchers. Papers may be sorted using a comparator.
      Parameters:
      comparator - sorting comparator

    • getTopCitedResearcher

      public static model.research.ResearchDecorator getTopCitedResearcher()
      Finds researcher with the highest total number of citations.
      Returns:
      top cited researcher

    • getTopCitedResearcherByYear

      public static model.research.ResearchDecorator getTopCitedResearcherByYear(int year)
      Finds top cited researcher for a specific year.
      Parameters:
      year - target year
      Returns:
      top cited researcher of the year
